neighborhoods.name: Bocas Town (Isla Colon)
neighborhoods.description: Caribbean island town with colorful wooden buildings, dive shops, and a laid-back tropical atmosphere
neighborhoods.character: Caribbean island town, colorful, dive culture

housing.predominantType: Wooden Caribbean houses and small apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Bocas del Toro. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Bocas del Toro

neighborhoods.name: Big Creek / Playa Bluff
neighborhoods.description: Eastern end of Isla Colon with surfing beaches and more secluded properties

housing.predominantType: Beach houses, eco-homes, and rustic properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Bocas del Toro's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Bocas del Toro

neighborhoods.name: Almirante
neighborhoods.description: Mainland port town with ferry connections and significantly lower costs than the islands
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Bocas del Toro

neighborhoods.name: Isla Bastimentos / Red Frog Beach
neighborhoods.description: Island community with eco-resorts, red frog sanctuary, and international residents

housing.predominantType: Eco-homes, beach houses, and island resort properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Bocas del Toro
